records.question: Which goalies named Lehman, born in 1885, who catch left, are exactly 68 inches tall, played as goalies, died in month 4, and had at most 3 losses and 1 win under their coach?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
JOIN goaliessc ON master.playerid = goaliessc.playerid
WHERE master.height = '68' AND master.shootcatch = 'L' AND goaliessc.l <= 3 AND goaliessc.w <= 1 AND master.pos = 'G' AND master.deathmon = '4' AND master.lastname = 'Lehman' AND master.birthyear = '1885'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.playerID
FROM Master AS T1
INNER JOIN Goalies AS T2
  ON T1.playerID = T2.playerID
INNER JOIN Coaches AS T3
  ON T2.year = T3.year AND T2.tmID = T3.tmID
WHERE
  T1.lastName = 'Lehman' AND T1.birthYear = '1885' AND T1.shootCatch = 'L' AND T1.height = '68' AND T1.pos = 'G' AND T1.deathMon = '4' AND T3.l <= 3 AND T3.w <= 1

records.question: Which players born in 1903 have coaches in the NHL, played in the NHL themselves, and have allowed at most 0 shootout goals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
JOIN awardsplayers ON master.playerid = awardsplayers.playerid
JOIN goaliessc ON master.playerid = goaliessc.playerid
WHERE awardsplayers.lgid = 'NHL' AND goaliessc.sho <= 0 AND master.birthyear = '1903' AND coaches.lgid = 'NHL'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.playerID
FROM Master AS T1
INNER JOIN Coaches AS T2
  ON T1.coachID = T2.coachID
INNER JOIN GoaliesShootout AS T3
  ON T1.playerID = T3.playerID
WHERE
  T1.birthYear = '1903' AND T2.lgID = 'NHL' AND T3.GA <= 0 AND (
    EXISTS (
      SELECT
        1
      FROM Scoring AS T4
      WHERE
        T4.playerID = T1.playerID AND T4.lgID = 'NHL'
    )
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT
        1
      FROM Goalies AS T5
      WHERE
        T5.playerID = T1.playerID AND T5.lgID = 'NHL'
    )
  )
